allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({'nb_points': len\(d.get\('serie', []\)\), 'first': d['serie'][0] if d.get\('serie'\) else None, 'last': d['serie'][-1] if d.get\('serie'\) else None}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
